text.title: cognitive-inclusion-design Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for cognitive-inclusion-design as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Auto-save data to localStorage without scoping to authenticated session.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Shared devices expose draft data to other users. Scope auto-save to the authenticated user's server-side session.

failure-mode.description: Over-apologetic copy: "We're so sorry this happened!" on every error.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Excessive apology language is itself anxiety-inducing for many users; aim for calm, neutral, factual tone.
